headline: T-Mobile adds new internet plan restriction customers will feel
summary: T-Mobile has recently been making significant changes to its internet plans amid rising consumer demand. The company’s fiber and fixed wireless internet services attracted over 500,000 new customers in the first quarter of 2026, T-Mobile CEO Srini Gopalan said on an earnings call with analysts in ...

headline: US operators move the goalposts to better frame account and convergence growth
summary: Real, sustainable, long-term growth is decidedly hard to come by these days, and there’s no clearer sign of how unforgiving the US services space has become than the big three nationwide telcos all deciding to overhaul their reporting structures for Q1 2026.
